item.title: Ba edge Navua 3-1 during penalties to win BiC Fiji FACT after 16-year wait
item.description: Ba claim the BiC Fiji FACT title after defeating Navua 3-1 in a dramatic penalty shootout at ending a 16-year wait for a major tit

item.title: Legge pleased as Drua Women secure home semi-final with big Reds win
item.description: McDonald's Fiji Drua Women Coach Mike Legge says he is pretty happy with the team's perfomance in their 50-17 win over the Queensl

item.title: Portugal held to a 0-0 draw by Colombia at FIFA World Cup
item.description: Portugal has been held to a 0-0 draw by Colombia in their final FIFA World Cup Group K match. Both teams failed to find the breakthrough after the match was locked at 0-0 at half-time.
item.content:encoded:
Portugal has been held to a 0-0 draw by Colombia in their final FIFA World Cup Group K match.

Both teams failed to find the breakthrough after the match was locked at 0-0 at half-time.

Meanwhile in other matches, DR Congo beat Uzbekistan 3-1, England defeated Panama 2-0, while Croatia edged Ghana 2-1 in their final FIFA World Cup group matches.

Today's FIFA World Cup action continues with Algeria taking on Austria and Jordan facing Argentina at 2pm.

item.title: England finish top After 2-0 win over Panama in FIFA World Cup clash
item.description: England has finished on top of Group L at the FIFA World Cup after beating Panama 2-0 in their final group match. The match was locked 0-0 at half-time before England came alive in the second half.
item.content:encoded:
England has finished on top of Group L at the FIFA World Cup after beating Panama 2-0 in their final group match.

The match was locked 0-0 at half-time before England came alive in the second half.

Jude Bellingham opened the scoring in the 62nd minute after which Harry Kane then doubled the lead five minutes later.

Croatia edged Ghana 2-1 to secure their place in the FIFA World Cup Round of 32

Meanwhile, today's FIFA World Cup action continues with Colombia taking on Portugal and DR Congo facing Uzbekistan at 11:30am, while Algeria meet Austria and Jordan play Argentina at 2pm.

item.title: Flying Fijians have four days to prepare for Wales Test
item.description: With a week to go till the Nations Championship, members of the FIJI Water Flying Fijians that were based in Fiji have already flo

item.title: Ba and Navua to face off in Fiji FACT final after 16 years
item.description: Ba and Navua will face each other in the BIC Fiji FACT final for the first time in 16 years when they meet at 3pm today at Subrail Park in Labasa. Navua will be looking to avenge their 2010 Fiji FACT final defeat to Ba, while the Men in Black will be hoping to lift the title for the first time since that victory after finishing runners-up in 2012 and 2013.
item.content:encoded:
Ba and Navua will face each other in the BIC Fiji FACT final for the first time in 16 years when they meet at 3pm today at Subrail Park in Labasa.

Navua will be looking to avenge their 2010 Fiji FACT final defeat to Ba, while the Men in Black will be hoping to lift the title for the first time since that victory after finishing runners-up in 2012 and 2013.

Ba booked their place in the final after edging defending champions Labasa 1-0 after extra time, while Navua came from behind to beat Lautoka 2-1 in their semi-final.

A large crowd is expected at Subrail Park as supporters from both districts turn out to cheer on their teams in what promises to be an exciting final.
